query:
-- Verificar se o leagueId padrão (1) está correto vs o torneio vinculado (477)
SELECT 
  ps.apiFootballLeagueId AS settingsLeagueId,
  ps.apiFootballSeason AS settingsSeason,
  t.id AS tournamentId,
  t.name AS tournamentName,
  t.apiFootballLeagueId AS tournamentLeagueId,
  t.apiFootballSeason AS tournamentSeason
FROM platform_settings ps
CROSS JOIN tournaments t
WHERE ps.id = 1 AND t.apiFootballLeagueId IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
  ps.apiFootballLeagueId AS settingsLeagueId,
  ps.apiFootballSeason AS settingsSeason,
  t.id AS tournamentId,
  t.name AS tournamentName,
  t.apiFootballLeagueId AS tournamentLeagueId,
  t.apiFootballSeason AS tournamentSeason
FROM platform_settings ps
CROSS JOIN tournaments t
WHERE ps.id = 1 AND t.apiFootballLeagueId IS NOT NULL;
